metadata.description: Unified armor naming system with prefix/suffix support and trait assignment (v4.2 - Hybrid Enhancement System)
notes: Material references use v4.1 syntax for metals (armor-appropriate)
Prefixes and suffixes merged from separate files (deprecated in v4.0)
Traits are applied when components are selected in patterns
Trait merging: numbers take highest, strings take last, booleans use OR
Emergent rarity calculated from combined component weights
Materials are now applied through the budget-based generation system, not pattern references
Enchantments can be added to patterns using component tokens or references
